name: Acoustic2 Official Rw Generic Holdout Surrogates (2026-03-10)
description: Official Knauf manufacturer references collected on 2026-03-10 and evaluated as element_lab surrogate holdouts. These cases intentionally avoid exact verified matching so they measure generic Rw solver quality rather than catalog anchoring.

cases.label: Knauf W111 50/75, 1x12.5 A board each side, generic Rw holdout
cases.source: https://knauf.com/api/download-center/v1/assets/8b5d23c5-a182-4ac8-81f7-2a6d7c289d12?country=nl&download=true (2026-03-10, Table 6: W111 50/75 -> Rw 34 dB; element_lab surrogate, exact field override intentionally disabled)
